---
name: Scenario misclassification
about: Report a governance suggestion that was classified into the wrong scenario
title: "[Scenario] "
labels: bug, scenario
assignees: ""
---

## What was scanned?

Describe the directory, application data, or file set involved.

## What did the app classify it as?

Describe the governance suggestion title, tags, and risk level you saw.

## What did you expect instead?

Describe the scenario label or recommendation that would be more accurate.

## Why does this matter?

Explain whether this affects trust, actionability, or safety.
